body.title: [triage] Consolidate the copilot-at-work 'move pre-build into Python' tickets into the UU build-packet lineage
body.intention: I intend that the outstanding copilot-at-work tickets to move pre-build into Python are captured and reconciled against the existing UU pre-inference/build-packet lineage — so the work isn't lost across contexts and doesn't fork a parallel implementation.
body.description:
Akien 2026-07-03 raised two linked things: (a) 'we should do that' — actually move pre-build into Python, per outstanding copilot-at-work tickets; and (b) the self-diagnostic diagnostics data-pack (T-self-diagnostic-trouble-tickets) is 'one layer before what's-needed-to-build' — the failure-evidence pack a repair-planner consumes, the same CLASS of JSON data pack as 'what's-needed-to-build'. Capturing (a) here so it survives compaction rather than living only as context on the self-diagnostic ticket.

**Existing UU lineage this must reconcile against (do not fork a parallel effort):** T-uu-build-packet-compiler (2026-06-25), D-pre-inference-assembly-2026-06-05, T-pre-inference-assembler, T-sprint-wire-pre-inference, T-consequence-pre-inference-assembly, T-dsimnel-pre-inference-parity. Memory: [[project_build_packet_pre_inference_compiler]] (pre-inference compiler, 51% measured).

**Blocked on Akien input:** the copilot-at-work tickets are EXTERNAL — Akien to provide/paste/link their contents before this can be scoped. Then: map each copilot ticket to the lineage above (duplicate / extends / genuinely-new) and produce a consolidation plan (likely via /sorted into a decision + children). Do NOT start building the Python pre-build move under this id.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery: needs the copilot ticket contents from Akien.
**Design rules:** none apply (planning/consolidation ticket).
**Scope boundary:** IN — gather the copilot pre-build tickets, reconcile each against the UU lineage, emit a consolidation plan. OUT — implementing the Python pre-build move (that becomes children of the plan).
**Test plan:** no automated tests because this is a capture/triage/planning ticket. Acceptance: a consolidation plan (decision or ticket set) exists that maps every copilot pre-build ticket to a UU lineage item or a new child.
**Rollback:** n/a (planning artifact; no code).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
**Completion criteria:** every copilot-at-work pre-build ticket is mapped to a UU lineage item or a new child, captured in a consolidation plan (decision or ticket set).
